# programs.fastfetch

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.fastfetch`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.fastfetch.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fastfetch. |
| `programs.fastfetch.package` | `null or package` | The fastfetch package to use. |
| `programs.fastfetch.settings` | `JSON value` | Configuration written to {file}`$XDG_CONFIG_HOME/fastfetch/config.jsonc`. See <https://github.com/fastfetch-cli/fastfetch/wiki/Json-Schema> for the documentation. |
